name: Rick Larsen
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $344,485 for Rick Larsen in U.S. House, WA-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
